# Sprint: Sprint S11 — Tech Debt: Pipeline Bug Fixes, Command Gaps, and UX Completeness

> Sprint ID: FORGE-S11
> Status: 🔵 active
> Execution Mode: wave-parallel

## Goal

Fix six confirmed pipeline bugs (timestamps, gate crash, model fallback, collate links, calibration baseline, and no quiz-agent command), close flat-file cleanup gap, and optionally refactor CJS APIs to structured Results — so the core pipeline runs without workarounds.
